title: tephrosia djalonica
intro: Tephrosia djalonica, also known as African milk tree or milk bush, is a plant species native to West Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Tephrosia djalonica include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and prevent the spread of infections. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia djalonica can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, and the plant is also used in traditional African medicine to treat various ailments.
